# Narrative IR — Sample

## Talk meta
- intent: a 15-minute conference talk
- time-budget: 15 minutes
- page-budget: 2–4 content slides
- depth/tone: technical conference talk

### N00 — Title
- goal: title frame
- key-message: n/a
- time-budget: 0 min
- supporting-figures: none

### N01 — Motivation
- goal: orient the audience
- key-message: the problem matters
- time-budget: 2 min
- supporting-figures: figure-001

### N02 — Method
- goal: explain the approach
- key-message: how it works
- time-budget: 3 min
- supporting-figures: none
